title: Asuka is hot
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Asuka is hot! Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:07 pm So in the preview, the Angel shoots some kind of light which concentrates on Asuka. which makes her eye go all bubbly. and again here's a shot of the head The question at hand is: Why does her eye ooze bubbles? Is it because the improv-repaired right eye on 02 isn't as well shielded as the still intact one? But 02 lost her right eye, whereas Asuka has her eyepatch on the left. Is the heat produced boiling the LCL and Asuka's bodily fluids(dunno how these things work)? And excuse me if I am late to the party, but do we know this already?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:13 pm still think there's something interesting under that eyepatch

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:14 pm well her eyepatch does have that red hot glow to it

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:15 pm Do we know if Asuka got that eyepatch as a result of Unit 03, or from something that happened during the 14 year gap?

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:17 pm I guess she has Sakura's penis worm under the eyepatch burrowed in her brain that tells her what the mysterious Lilim want. Certainly that would explain wtf the bit mentioned by LiLi ment

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:18 pm In 2.0 there's a shot of Asuka locked away in NERV headquarters being worked on after the Bardiel incident. If you look closely there's something with a needle inspecting her eye. I'm pretty confident she lost her eye during 2.0. As for what's under the eyepath, I always imagine it's the NERV logo. (Lol) Or the Will-E logo now. But there's still another movie to find out.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:23 pm It's an established mechanic in NME that attacks to Evas result in massive LCL bubbling over the corresponding body parts on the pilots. Haven't studied the 3.0 opening enough to make a good guess about what causes the eye damage, but it could be due to the Angel reflecting light onto Eva-02's real eyes through the green lenses. Only Asuka's left eye shows synch effects presumably because the right side of Eva-02's head is a mechanical implant not subject to physical pain.

[]: Post by Kodaemon » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:23 pm Localized bubbling around pain affected places is not new, I think, don't remember glowing though. Don't ask me how it works. The light hurts Unit 02's biological left eye, so synchro means Asuka feels (phantom) pain there as well. That's all I can think of.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:25 pm If you've watched enough anime, you know what she's got under that eyepatch is a rule-of-sympathy based Angel detector, like Sakamoto Mio

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:38 pm It looks like the glowing is just a side-effect of the Eva taking damage. Asuka's shoulder glows when its arm gets blown off, too.

[]: Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:42 pm She's got this; SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by penguintruth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:57 pm Azathoth wrote: still think there's something interesting under that eyepatch

[]: Post by CJD » Sun Nov 18, 2012 4:59 pm I swear I've seen this before somwhere... SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Kodaemon » Sun Nov 18, 2012 5:01 pm Why does Asuka wear an eyepatch? because SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 18, 2012 9:00 pm TOPIC.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 18, 2012 10:29 pm Any confusion has been satisfactorily addressed, I think, and the topic isn't really conducive to additional productive discussion, so I'm locking this.
